text: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating well. A balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains provides essential nutrients. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling for 30 minutes a day, strengthens your body and boosts your mood. Additionally, getting enough sleep—around seven to nine hours for most adults—is vital for recovery and focus. However, physical health is only one part of the picture. Paying attention to your mental health is equally important. For example, managing stress through relaxation techniques and maintaining a healthy work-life balance can prevent burnout. By combining these habits, you can build a sustainable lifestyle that supports both your body and mind.
